title: Visible Annotation ( Annotation)
text: Visible Annotation ( Annotation) Determines whether labels (annotations) are displayed for each major tick. True (default) or False . Annotation = " True | False " Value Description True (default) Annotation labels are displayed at each major tick. False No annotations are displayed. Example: Setting in ProcScript $fieldproperties(METER) = "annotation=false" Copy Applies To umeter (Meter) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
